items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：美国政府发布出口管制指令，要求暂停所有对 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 模型的访问。相对此前这两个模型刚发布并已开放使用，本次为合规层面的强制下线，涉及区域可用性与 API 可达性发生重大变化。已在调用 Claude Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的服务需要立即切回可用模型。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：检查生产环境是否硬编码 claude-fable-5* 或 claude-mythos-5* model id，若有立即回退到仍可用的 claude-opus-4-8 或 claude-sonnet 系列；同时关闭相关 prompt cache 与 batch 任务，等待出口管制解除或官方替代方案。

items.title: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the be
items.original_summary: nefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger perform...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 一揽子发布多条信息：启动 Claude Corps（面向职业早期人士的国家 fellowship）、提出「AI Exponential」政策建议、扩展 Project Glasswing 至约 150 个新组织（覆盖 15+ 国家），并正式发布 Claude Opus 4.8。本次内容摘要混杂，实际工程相关主要在 Claude Opus 4.8 发布与 Glasswing 扩展。
items.backend_focus: 重点关注 Claude Opus 4.8 的 API 上线：将 model id 切换到 claude-opus-4-8，重新跑回归与 prompt 评测；Glasswing 扩展可能涉及新的组织白名单与区域可用性变化，需确认本团队所在区域是否在覆盖范围。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements   Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of m...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 从原有试点扩展到约 150 个新组织，覆盖 15+ 国家，主要面向 AI 安全研究、政策与社会公益机构。这是项目参与范围的扩展，不涉及新模型能力、API 接口或定价变化。工程层面若团队不在受邀组织内则无任何影响。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动（除非团队收到 Glasswing 受邀通知）。涉及 model、tool use、context window、max_tokens 等 API 字段完全不变；仅合作组织的访问配额与计费通道可能调整。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级版本，在编码、agent 任务与专业工作负载上表现更强，并附带相应的安全与负责任扩展评估。这是 Opus 系列的一次常规大版本升级，相对 Claude Opus 4.5 在 agentic 与 coding 基准上有显著提升。已使用 Opus 系列 API 的团队应评估是否升级 model id。
items.backend_focus: 建议行动：将高复杂度 agent / coding 任务的 model 从 claude-opus-4-5（或当前版本）切换到 claude-opus-4-8，重新跑 tool use、context window 与 max_tokens 相关回归；评估 prompt cache 命中率与单次任务成本变化，确认是否需要调整 fallback 链。

items.title: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas" The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on A
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 联合创始人 Chris Olah 就教皇 Leo XIV 的通谕「Magnifica humanitas」发表讲话全文，属于 AI 与伦理/宗教政策层面的公关内容。本次发布无任何模型、API、SDK、定价或限流变化，对工程系统零影响。
items.backend_focus: 与工程无关。纯品牌与政策沟通，不涉及 API 字段、SDK 版本、context window、region 可用性或 deprecation 时间线。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 宣布在首尔开设办公室并与韩国 AI 生态系统的多家机构建立新合作。本次为区域市场拓展与商务公告，不涉及新模型发布、新 API 端点或 SDK 版本变化。已在亚太区域调用 Claude API 的服务可能获得更稳定的连接，但接口层完全无变化。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。API 接入地址、model id、pricing 与 rate limit 均不因办公室开业而变化；如使用 region-specific endpoint（如 AWS Bedrock Anthropic 模型），可关注首尔区域后续是否开放。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首期「Anthropic Public Record」结果，展示公司在透明度与政策实践方面的进展。属于公司治理与透明度披露，不涉及任何模型能力、API、SDK 或定价变化。工程系统完全不受影响。
items.backend_focus: 与工程无关。透明度报告类内容，不涉及 API/SDK 字段变更、deprecation 时间线或 region/限流调整。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 TCS（塔塔咨询服务）达成合作，将 Claude 引入受监管行业（金融、医疗等）。这是渠道与合规合作公告，没有发布新模型、新 API 或新参数。对接入 Claude API 的开发者系统无接口、限流或定价变化。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。无需修改 API key、model id、prompt、tool use schema 或 region 配置；通过 TCS 渠道采购的客户可能在合同与数据驻留上有差异，但 API 接入面不变。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 DXC Technology 结盟，将 Claude 集成进银行、航空等受监管行业所依赖的核心系统。这是企业渠道合作公告，不涉及新模型、新 API 端点或 SDK 版本。对开发者侧 API 调用完全无影响。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。model id、API endpoint、tool use、context window、max_tokens 等接口面零变更；仅合作客户的合规采购流程可能有变化。
